title: podman-remote build: --arch/--os/--platform are ignored
body:
```console
$ echo "FROM scratch" | ./bin/podman-remote build -t foo --arch=abc --os=def -
STEP 1: FROM scratch
STEP 2: COMMIT foo
--> f45b3238f3a
f45b3238f3a1bcf538a2e0fd67f0cacf3f44d18e9ffb71743c146e7197bba783
$ ./bin/podman inspect --format '{{.Architecture}}-{{.Os}}' foo
amd64-linux   (expected: abc-def)
```
Likewise with `--platform`. Flags all work fine with non-remote podman.

comments.body: Fixed by #9962, and I've confirmed on my end (running buildah-bud tests with podman-remote on my laptop)
